name: Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the cheese is at room temperature.
2. Blend all ingredients together using a mixer or food processor.
3. Line a small bowl with plastic wrap and pour the mixed ingredients into the lined bowl.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. When ready to use, unmold, remove the wrap, and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
6. Serve with assorted crackers.
